description: Refactor the public TikTok analytics dashboard into a growth intelligence system with snapshot-based period metrics, normalized rankings, and rule-based diagnostics.

userStories.title: Add profile daily snapshot table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a dedicated daily profile snapshot table so period analytics can be calculated from history instead of lifetime counters.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a profile daily snapshot table that stores profile reference, snapshot date, collected time, source, followers, following, total likes, and total posts
Enforce one logical snapshot per profile per day
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add post daily snapshot table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a dedicated daily post snapshot table so per-post growth can be measured across time windows.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a post daily snapshot table that stores post reference, snapshot date, collected time, source, views, likes, comments, shares, saves, and reposts
Keep saves and reposts nullable so missing public data is preserved as unavailable
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Persist profile snapshots on successful refresh
userStories.description: As a developer, I want every successful public profile refresh to capture a daily profile snapshot automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Successful profile persistence also writes a profile daily snapshot for the fetched day
Repeated refreshes on the same day do not create duplicate logical profile snapshots
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Persist post snapshots on successful refresh
userStories.description: As a developer, I want every successful post refresh to capture daily post snapshots so post growth can be computed later.
acceptanceCriteria: Successful post persistence also writes daily snapshots for refreshed posts
Repeated refreshes on the same day do not create duplicate logical post snapshots
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add snapshot boundary queries
userStories.description: As a developer, I need snapshot lookup helpers for current-period and previous-period boundaries so analytics can read history consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Add read paths that fetch the closest available profile and post snapshots for period start, period end, previous period start, and previous period end
Boundary lookups return safe empty results when history is missing
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Calculate profile period deltas
userStories.description: As a creator, I want real profile growth during a selected period so I can understand followers and account momentum correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Calculate profile period deltas for followers, following, total likes, and total posts using snapshot differences
Calculate previous-period deltas and percentage change for the same profile metrics when history is sufficient
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Calculate post period deltas
userStories.description: As a creator, I want post growth to reflect what each post earned in the selected period, not its current lifetime total.
acceptanceCriteria: Calculate per-post deltas for views, likes, comments, shares, saves, and reposts from snapshot differences
Keep missing saves and reposts unavailable instead of converting them to zero in delta calculations
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Classify posts by publication window and growth window
userStories.description: As a creator, I want to distinguish posts published during the period from older posts that grew during the period.
acceptanceCriteria: Classify posts into published-in-period and grew-in-period groups
Flag evergreen or late-growth candidates when older posts continue earning meaningful period growth
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Expand public efficiency metrics
userStories.description: As a creator, I want relative quality metrics so I can compare posts fairly across different sizes.
acceptanceCriteria: Calculate engagement rate using likes, comments, shares, saves, and reposts when available
Calculate share rate, comment rate, save rate, repost rate, and engagement per 1,000 views without inventing false zeros
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add normalized post score calculator
userStories.description: As a creator, I want the best-post ranking to reward efficient and repeatable posts instead of only the biggest ones.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a normalized post score that combines available efficiency metrics with recent growth inputs
Ranking no longer defaults to absolute engagement total when score inputs are available
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Extend dashboard payload for lifetime and period analytics
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a dashboard payload that separates lifetime data from period analytics so the UI can stay semantically correct.
acceptanceCriteria: Add payload sections for lifetime metrics, period metrics, previous-period comparison, and post-growth analysis
Keep payload compatible with profiles that do not yet have enough snapshots by returning explicit fallback states
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Assemble snapshot-aware dashboard responses
userStories.description: As a product owner, I want the dashboard assembler to use historical deltas as the source of truth for period performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard assembly uses snapshot-based deltas for period performance and comparisons
Lifetime aggregates remain available alongside period analytics in the same response
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Make dashboard filters period-aware
userStories.description: As a creator, I want the 7d, 30d, and 90d filters to reflect earned performance in the selected window.
acceptanceCriteria: Selected dashboard ranges drive snapshot-based period calculations instead of published-at-only totals
Profiles with insufficient history show a safe fallback state rather than misleading period numbers
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Show lifetime and period overview metrics
userStories.description: As a creator, I want to see current totals separately from period growth so I can read the dashboard without ambiguity.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard overview shows distinct lifetime metrics and period metrics for the selected range
Overview includes current-period versus previous-period comparison where history exists
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Show recent growers and evergreen posts
userStories.description: As a creator, I want to identify which posts recently gained the most and which older posts keep compounding.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows a recent-growth ranking based on period deltas
Dashboard separately highlights evergreen or late-growth posts when older content keeps earning meaningful growth
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add rule-based diagnostics engine
userStories.description: As a creator, I want clear rule-based explanations of what is working so I do not have to infer every pattern manually.
acceptanceCriteria: Generate diagnostics for above-average growth, high share rate, high volume with low efficiency, older posts driving growth, and profile slowdown versus previous period
Diagnostics consume the same snapshot-based metrics used elsewhere in the dashboard
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Render diagnostics and replication signals
userStories.description: As a creator, I want actionable diagnostics and replication hints surfaced directly in the dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard renders rule-based diagnostics in a dedicated section
Diagnostics include at least one replication-oriented signal tied to a winning pattern from public data
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
